macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Tumble to 6-Month Lows
items.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq indices have fallen to their lowest levels in six months amid ongoing market volatility. Sentiment analysis indicates mixed signals from options indicators, with no extreme fear levels yet.

items.title: Brent Crude Rises Past $110 as Oil Prices Surge
items.summary: Brent crude oil prices have climbed above $110 per barrel, extending upward momentum despite unstable historical correlation with stock market performance. Analysts note that higher oil prices may not necessarily harm stocks or the economy.

items.title: Value Stocks to Watch: Invesco QQQ, SanDisk, and Comcast Highlighted
items.summary: MarketBeat identifies Invesco QQQ, SanDisk (SNDK), and Comcast (CMCSA) as top value stocks due to pricing below intrinsic worth and high trading volume. These provide exposure to tech, storage, and media sectors.

items.title: Stock Market Unfazed by Oil Prices Amid Iran Conflict
items.summary: Despite rising oil prices linked to the Iran War, the stock market shows no strong correlation, with historical data revealing unstable relationships between crude oil and S&P 500 movements. Energy sector gained 3% while tech stocks face supply risks from scarce materials.

items.title: US EIA Reports Significant Crude Oil Stock Build
items.summary: EIA data shows a 6.156 million barrel increase in US crude oil stocks, alongside declines in gasoline and distillate inventories. This comes amid broader oil market upward trends.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Global Crypto Market Cap Reaches $2.42 Trillion
items.summary: The total cryptocurrency market capitalization stands at $2.42T, marking a 0.23% increase over the last 24 hours, per CoinMarketCap data.

items.title: Bitcoin Transitions from Bear Channel to Long-Term Trading Range
items.summary: Analyst Josep Capo reports Bitcoin moving from a bear channel into a trading range, with a probable recovery toward $90,000 this year after a second leg down; current low seen as poor for bears.

items.title: Stagflation Emerges as Key Macro Theme for 2026 Impacting Bitcoin
items.summary: Stagflation conditions—with persistent inflation, growth deterioration, and policy constraints—are testing Bitcoin's role, potentially leading to choppy trading followed by outperformance as a scarce store of value.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Wall Street Skeptical of Nvidia's Latest AI Vision at Conference
items.summary: Wall Street reacts negatively to Nvidia's recent AI conference presentation, questioning its vision amid market concerns. Coverage highlights this as a top story in today's AI updates.

items.title: Microsoft Rolls Back Copilot AI Features on Windows
items.summary: Microsoft announces reduction of Copilot AI bloat in Windows, scaling back certain features following user and performance feedback.

items.title: Pentagon-Anthropic Legal Battle Escalates Over AI Safety
items.summary: Ongoing legal dispute between the Pentagon and Anthropic involves national security risk assessments and disagreements on AI safety standards, with complex behind-the-scenes discussions.

items.title: AI Tokens Integrated into Engineering Compensation Packages
items.summary: Tech companies increasingly include AI tokens as part of engineering compensation, reflecting a new trend in industry rewards and incentives.

items.title: Major Publisher Pulls Novel Amid AI Generation Concerns
items.summary: A prominent publisher withdraws a novel due to controversies surrounding AI involvement in its creation, sparking debates on AI in publishing.

items.title: ThinkLabs and SCE Unveil AI Digital Twins for Grid Solutions
items.summary: ThinkLabs collaborates with Southern California Edison using physics-informed AI digital twins on Microsoft Azure and NVIDIA platforms to accelerate grid energization analysis from 35 days to 90 seconds, addressing AI-driven power demands.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Saudi Arabia Acquires 10% Stake in Capcom via EGDC and PIF
items.summary: Saudi Arabia's EGDC and PIF have acquired a 10% stake in Capcom as part of economic diversification efforts. This move highlights growing international investment in major game publishers.

items.title: Crimson Desert Achieves 2 Million Day-One Sales Despite Technical Issues
items.summary: Pearl Abyss's Crimson Desert sold over 2 million copies on launch but faced mixed reviews and technical problems on PC and PS5, causing a 30% drop in developer stock price. The studio plans long-term support and transmedia expansion.

items.title: NVIDIA Announces DLSS 5 at GTC, Faces Backlash from Developers
items.summary: NVIDIA unveiled DLSS 5, integrating generative AI for enhanced graphics, but art teams from Ubisoft and Capcom expressed concerns over loss of artistic control in demos using their games. The announcement sparked vocal criticism from gamers and developers.

items.title: Microsoft Reveals Project Helix: Unified Next-Gen Xbox Platform
items.summary: At GDC 2026, Microsoft detailed Project Helix, the next Xbox generation with cross-play between console and PC, advanced ray-tracing, machine learning, and 'Play Anywhere' cross-progression.

items.title: Google DeepMind Demos Genie 3 Generative AI for 3D Worlds
items.summary: Google DeepMind showcased Genie 3 at GDC, a generative AI tool that creates navigable 3D game worlds from text prompts, drawing significant interest from developers.

items.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Wins Game of the Year at GDCAs
items.summary: Sandfall Interactive's Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 was awarded Game of the Year at the GDC Awards, along with four other wins, solidifying its status as a top RPG.

items.title: Widespread Layoffs Hit Ubisoft, Warner Bros., and Embracer Group
items.summary: Major studios including Ubisoft, Warner Bros., and Embracer Group announced aggressive downsizing and pivots due to failed projects like High Guard live-service and Rare Sony refunds.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SEC Approves Nasdaq's Blockchain Settlement Option
items.summary: The U.S. SEC has cleared Nasdaq's blockchain-based settlement system, marking a significant shift in equity market infrastructure and boosting competitive dynamics in trading technology.

items.title: PlayStation Network Experiences Major Outage
items.summary: PSN suffered a widespread outage affecting multiple services including account management, gaming, and online play, with Sony confirming issues but slow updates drawing criticism from users.

items.title: India Positions Itself as Tech Leader for Global South
items.summary: Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan stated India is set to fulfill the technology needs of the Global South in areas like digital transactions and affordable healthcare, highlighted at the Bharat Innovates Deep-Tech Pre-Summit.

items.title: Bharat Innovates Deep-Tech Pre-Summit Showcases 137 Startups
items.summary: The event at IIT Bombay featured deep-tech innovations across 13 domains including semiconductors, space, and energy, gathering over 200 founders, 70 investors, and industry leaders.
